ModMetaData.name: Clash Of Rim
ModMetaData.author: AIRsLight
ModMetaData.description: Dedicated-server multiplayer mod for RimWorld where each player runs an independent colony on a shared world. Clash Of Rim synchronizes multiplayer world state and coordinates diplomacy, trade, gifts, colonist support, raids, offline events, chat, achievements, server shops, banking, mercenaries, and administrator controls through save snapshots and event confirmation.
